text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (3-Tier) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is pixel live AND ICP defined AND exclusions list available?

branch.question: Is daily budget ≥ $100 AND product broad-appeal?

text.example: pixel_ok, icp_defined, exclusions ready, $200/day budget → Advantage+ allowed; Core+Custom+LAL+Adv+ shipped.
